task_completion.description: Open CAMEO Data Manager and access the Contacts module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application is open, and the Contacts module or a contact entry form is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact's first and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name field contains 'Sarah' and the Last Name field contains 'Chen' in the contact form.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact's title and email address
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title field contains 'Environmental Compliance Officer' and the Email field contains 'schen@burlingtonfire.gov'.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact's phone number and phone type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Phone field contains '802-555-0147' and the corresponding phone type is set to 'Work phone' or 'Work'.
The Contact Type field or selection indicates 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator'.
The new contact record is saved, evidenced by the form being in view mode (not edit mode), a success message, or Sarah Chen appearing in the list of saved contacts.

integrity.description: Agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Data Manager application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is CAMEO Data Manager (version 4.5.1), not a text editor, mock-up, or generic database browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly edit underlying data files
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent editing XML, SQLite, or other database files directly using a text editor or DB tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a new contact to CAMEO Data Manager (version 4.5.1). The contact details to verify are: First Name: 'Sarah', Last Name: 'Chen', Title: 'Environmental Compliance Officer', Email: 'schen@burlingtonfire.gov', Phone: '802-555-0147' (Work phone), and Contact Type: 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator'. The facility is 'Green Valley Water Facility' in Colchester, Vermont. Existing contacts in the database include Debra Monaco, Vincent Martinez, and Mike Ward.
